scripts.start: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: bash -lc 'cd backend && if [ -f .venv/bin/activate ]; then source .venv/bin/activate; elif [ -f venv/bin/activate ]; then source venv/bin/activate; fi && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000'
